d2hr_e1_media_coverage.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_media_coverage.text: Word is spreading fast! Your excellent service is drawing attention. A local news reporter wants to feature your laundromat.

d2hr_e1_reporter.speaker: Reporter
d2hr_e1_reporter.text: I heard amazing things about this place! Your reputation for clean machines and friendly service is legendary. Can I do a feature?

choices.text: Allow it but set ground rules
Ask to review the article first

d2hr_e1_welcome.speaker: Reporter
d2hr_e1_welcome.text: You're so open and genuine! This is exactly the kind of story my audience loves. Your authenticity shines.

d2hr_e1_rules.speaker: Reporter
d2hr_e1_rules.text: Setting boundaries shows professionalism. I respect that. Let's make this work for both of us.

d2hr_e1_approval.speaker: Reporter
d2hr_e1_approval.text: Smart thinking! Most business owners never ask. Happy to share the draft before publishing.

d2hr_e1_decline.speaker: Reporter
d2hr_e1_decline.text: Oh, okay. Maybe another time then. I hope your laundromat continues to do well.

d2hr_e1_result_welcome.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_welcome.text: Openness builds powerful media relationships. Your reputation earned this opportunity — now you're amplifying it further.

d2hr_e1_result_rules.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_rules.text: Setting boundaries with media is professional. You protected your operations while seizing the opportunity.

d2hr_e1_result_approval.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_approval.text: Review rights protect your brand. Never let others define your story without your input.

d2hr_e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e1_result_decline.text: Missed opportunities rarely come back. Your reputation opened this door — balance busyness with growth.

d2hr_r_referral.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_referral.text: A regular customer sent their entire family to do laundry here today. Word-of-mouth is working!

d2hr_r_referral_b.speaker: Customer
d2hr_r_referral_b.text: My sister told me this place is the best. Clean machines, great service. I brought the whole family!

choices.text: Thank them warmly with no discount

d2hr_r_referral_discount.speaker: Customer
d2hr_r_referral_discount.text: A family discount? No wonder my sister raves about this place! We're all coming back.

d2hr_r_referral_thanks.speaker: Customer
d2hr_r_referral_thanks.text: The warm welcome alone is worth it. We'll definitely be regulars.

d2hr_r_referral_normal.speaker: Customer
d2hr_r_referral_normal.text: The machines are clean. We'll be back.

d2hr_r_referral_result_discount.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_referral_result_discount.text: Rewarding referrals creates a loyalty loop. Small discounts now can bring large returns later.

d2hr_r_referral_result_thanks.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_referral_result_thanks.text: Gratitude costs nothing but means everything. Warmth creates ambassadors.

d2hr_r_referral_result_normal.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_referral_result_normal.text: Basic service retains, but exceptional service grows. Word-of-mouth is powerful — nurture it.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_award.speaker: Inspector
d2hr_r_cleanliness_award.text: I'm from the Local Business Association. Your laundromat has been nominated for the Neighborhood Cleanliness Award!

d2hr_r_cleanliness_b.speaker: You
d2hr_r_cleanliness_b.text: An unexpected nomination! How do you respond?

choices.text: Ask what the award entails first
Humbly decline — too humble for awards

d2hr_r_cleanliness_accept.speaker: Inspector
d2hr_r_cleanliness_accept.text: Wonderful! Your dedication to cleanliness is an inspiration to other local businesses.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_ask.speaker: Inspector
d2hr_r_cleanliness_ask.text: Smart to ask! It's mostly a plaque and a feature in the local paper. No obligations.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_decline.speaker: Inspector
d2hr_r_cleanliness_decline.text: I respect your humility. The offer stands if you change your mind.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_accept.text: Recognition builds reputation. Accepting awards graciously sends a signal of confidence.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_ask.text: Due diligence before commitment is always wise. You got the full picture and made an informed decision.

d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_cleanliness_result_decline.text: Humility is admirable, but recognition has value. Sometimes accepting praise is as important as earning it.

d2hr_r_community_event.speaker: Community Leader
d2hr_r_community_event.text: Your laundromat has become a neighborhood anchor. Would you sponsor the upcoming block party?

d2hr_r_community_b.speaker: You
d2hr_r_community_b.text: A chance to give back to the community that supports you.

choices.text: Offer to donate laundry services instead

d2hr_r_community_generous.speaker: Community Leader
d2hr_r_community_generous.text: Wow, this is incredibly generous! The whole neighborhood will know your name.

d2hr_r_community_modest.speaker: Community Leader
d2hr_r_community_modest.text: Every bit helps! Thank you for supporting the community.

d2hr_r_community_services.speaker: Community Leader
d2hr_r_community_services.text: Free laundry for the event volunteers? That's a creative and thoughtful contribution!

d2hr_r_community_result_generous.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_community_result_generous.text: Generosity builds community goodwill that no marketing budget can buy. Smart long-term investment.

d2hr_r_community_result_modest.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_community_result_modest.text: Every contribution matters. Being part of the community is about showing up, not just how much you give.

d2hr_r_community_result_services.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_community_result_services.text: Creative giving often has more impact than cash. Your services are your superpower — use them!

d2hr_r_community_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_r_community_result_decline.text: Sometimes you can't give, but make sure it's not a pattern. Community relationships need nurturing.

d2hr_e3_premium_supplier.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_premium_supplier.text: Your excellent reputation has attracted a premium supplier. They offer eco-friendly, high-quality detergent.

d2hr_e3_supplier.speaker: Supplier
d2hr_e3_supplier.text: We only partner with businesses that have a strong reputation. Yours qualifies. Our detergent costs 40% more, but customers will notice the difference.

choices.text: Use premium for VIP customers only

d2hr_e3_full.speaker: Customer
d2hr_e3_full.text: Wow, our clothes have never smelled this fresh! What detergent are you using?

d2hr_e3_partial.speaker: Customer
d2hr_e3_partial.text: The premium service is amazing! The clothes feel softer and smell incredible.

d2hr_e3_trial.speaker: Supplier
d2hr_e3_trial.text: A trial period is reasonable. Two weeks at reduced cost so you can measure customer response.

d2hr_e3_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_decline.text: Loyalty to your current setup is valid, but premium opportunities at this stage are rare.

d2hr_e3_result_full.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_full.text: Premium positioning is powerful. Higher costs but higher perceived value — your reputation justifies it.

d2hr_e3_result_partial.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_partial.text: Selective premiumization is smart business. Flagship services carry the brand while keeping costs manageable.

d2hr_e3_result_trial.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_trial.text: Data before commitment is always wise. Measure real customer response before locking in higher costs.

d2hr_e3_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e3_result_decline.text: Comfort with the status quo can limit growth. Strong reputation creates leverage — use it while you have it.

d2hr_e4_expansion_offer.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_expansion_offer.text: A real estate agent just called. A prime location nearby is available — perfect for a second laundromat.

d2hr_e4_agent.speaker: Agent
d2hr_e4_agent.text: This space won't last long. Given your reputation, you could expand now. Interested?

d2hr_e4_quick.speaker: Agent
d2hr_e4_quick.text: Excellent decision! The space is yours. Bold moves like this separate growing businesses from stagnant ones.

d2hr_e4_think.speaker: Agent
d2hr_e4_think.text: Fair enough. 48 hours — after that, it's back on the market.

d2hr_e4_negotiate.speaker: Agent
d2hr_e4_negotiate.text: The owner is motivated. Your lower offer was accepted. Smart negotiating saved you capital.

d2hr_e4_pass.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_pass.text: Consolidation before expansion is wise. Many businesses fail by growing too fast.

d2hr_e4_result_quick.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_result_quick.text: Moving decisively on rare opportunities is a key skill. Your reputation gave you this option.

d2hr_e4_result_think.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_result_think.text: Taking time under pressure shows discipline. Use the 48 hours wisely.

d2hr_e4_result_negotiate.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_result_negotiate.text: Negotiating even in favorable markets is smart. Every peso saved can be reinvested.

d2hr_e4_result_pass.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e4_result_pass.text: Depth before breadth. A perfect single location often outperforms two mediocre ones.

d2hr_e5_partnership.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e5_partnership.text: End of a great day! A nearby cafe owner wants to collaborate on a joint promotion.

d2hr_e5_owner.speaker: Cafe Owner
d2hr_e5_owner.text: Your laundromat has the best reputation on this street. A joint promotion could double both our customer bases. Interested?

choices.text: Decline — focus on your own brand

d2hr_e5_agree.speaker: Cafe Owner
d2hr_e5_agree.text: Fantastic! This partnership is going to be incredible. 'Wash and Coffee' — I love it!

d2hr_e5_details.speaker: Cafe Owner
d2hr_e5_details.text: Due diligence is important. Let me walk you through the full plan.

d2hr_e5_pilot.speaker: Cafe Owner
d2hr_e5_pilot.text: A pilot is a brilliant idea. Test the waters before diving in.

d2hr_e5_decline.speaker: Cafe Owner
d2hr_e5_decline.text: I respect that. The offer stands if you change your mind.

d2hr_e5_result_agree.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e5_result_agree.text: Strategic partnerships multiply reach. Your reputation attracted this opportunity — now it's compounding.

d2hr_e5_result_details.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e5_result_details.text: Never commit without understanding the full picture. Asking for details protects your interests.

d2hr_e5_result_pilot.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e5_result_pilot.text: Pilots reduce risk. Testing compatibility before full commitment is one of the smartest moves.

d2hr_e5_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2hr_e5_result_decline.text: Brand focus is valid, but partnerships can accelerate growth significantly. Make sure independence is a strategy, not comfort.
